entities.description: The geographic region where the farming systems simulation is applied to aid agricultural development

entities.name: APSIM
entities.description: The Agricultural Productions Systems sIMulator, a tool used to simulate soil and crop processes in low yielding systems

entities.description: A crop grown in highly constrained, low yielding systems in southern Africa

entities.description: A crop grown in highly constrained, low yielding systems in southern Africa

entities.description: A method of agricultural research that is enhanced by the use of farming systems simulation

entities.description: A method of showing agricultural practices that is enhanced by the use of farming systems simulation

entities.name: INTERVENTION STRATEGIES
entities.description: Targeted plans developed using simulation to improve smallholder farming systems

entities.name: CLIMATE

entities.description: An environmental condition whose data is shared to increase the relevance of simulation

entities.description: The process of defining crop-specific parameters for use in simulation models
